reviews.review_msg: Great Cities course- Brooklyn. I didn't mind Niall and he seems like a pretty decent guy- definitely intelligent, well spoken and wry. Had a hard time sticking through four hours of lecture though, very little discussion. A book every two weeks or so.

if u get the feeling he is randomly saying anything,is  unorganized...just hang in there...midterm n quiz r from text book n he clearly specifies whats required 4 presentation n paper in the frist 2 classes.very approachable in class/OH & quick with email replys.
